title: Stellaria hippoctona

Further research may be required to confirm the accuracy of its classification.

intro: Stellaria alsheikhii, also known as Stellaria hippoctona, is a flowering plant in the Caryophyllaceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and inflammation, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The bioactive constituents of Stellaria alsheikhii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Stellaria alsheikhii is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions.
